channel.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 22nd, 2022
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • Healthchecks - Cron job monitoring service. (BSD 3-clause)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 8th, 2022
item.description:
Software

File Management

  • WinSCPstars1.5k - SFTP and FTP client for Windows (GNU GPLv3)

    • Software

    Utilities

  • Espansostars6k - A cross-playform text expander (GNU GPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Mar 24th, 2022
item.description:
Software

Office

  • Open Officestars675 - Provides a full featured office productivity suite based on open standards. (Apache License 2.0)

    • Software

    Text Editors

  • VS Codestars137.8k - A source-code editor made by Microsoft (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Apr 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • Cloverleaf - An open source app to replace your password manager without storing your passwords anywhere. (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Apr 3rd, 2021
item.description:
Software

File Sharing

  • Sharry - Convinient file sharing web application that allows you to upload files and get a url back that can then be shared. (GNU GPLv3+)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Mar 17th, 2021
item.description:
Resources

Documentaries

  • 2019: Hacking for the Commons, by Philippe Borrel.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Mar 4th, 2021
item.description:
Software

Other

  • IP2Tracestars12 - A traceroute tools that displaying geolocation information using IP2Location database. (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Feb 19th, 2021
item.description:
Software

Command Line Tools

  • SimpleLocalizestars34 - Open source tool for managing i18n keys in software projects.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Nov 27th, 2020
item.description:
Software

Graphics

  • Pinta - Gtk# clone of Paint.NET. (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Nov 25th, 2020
item.description:
Software

Video

  • MPV - Customizable multimedia player with scripting support. (GNU GPLv2)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Oct 19th, 2020
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • Dnote - A simple command line notebook with multi-device sync and web interface. (GNU AGPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software May 11th, 2020
item.description:
Software

Text Editors

  • vim - Vim is a highly configurable text editor built to make creating and changing any kind of text very efficient. (GNU GPL compatible)

    • Software

    Command Line Tools

  • GNU stow - GNU Stow is a symlink farm manager which takes distinct packages of software and/or data located in separate directories on the filesystem, and makes them appear to be installed in the same place. (GNU GPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Apr 6th, 2020
item.description:
Software

Utilities

  • Grayscale Modestars63 - An open source macOS app that lets you quickly toggle grayscale filter right from your menu bar or using a keyboard shortcut (⌥⌘G). (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Feb 21st, 2020
item.description:
Software

Audio

  • Nuclear Music Player - Streaming music player that finds music from free sources automatically. (GNU AGPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Feb 19th, 2020
item.description:
Software

Graphics

  • ExifCleaner - GUI app to remove exif metadata from images and videos with simple drag and drop. (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Dec 4th, 2019
item.description:
Software

File Management

  • Filestash - A Dropbox-like web client where users can bring their own backend (FTP, SFTP, Webdav, S3, Minio, ...). (GNU AGPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Mar 6th, 2019
item.description:
Software

Communication

  • Conversations - XMPP/Jabber client for Android. (GNU GPLv3)
  • Gajim - XMPP/Jabber client for desktop. (GNU GPLv3)

    • Software

    Web Applications

  • GNU social - Microblogging server written in PHP. (GNU GPLv3)
  • Wallabag - Save and classify articles. Read them later. Freely. (MIT)

    • Software

    Audio

  • Ardour - Digital Audio Workstation (DAW). (GNU GPLv2)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Dec 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Software

Communication

  • Mattermost - Open source, private cloud alternative to Slack. (Licensing)
  • Signal - Private messaging and calling for desktop, Android, and iOS. (GNU GPLv3)

    • Software

    File Sharing

  • qBittorrent - Easy to use BitTorrent client. (GNU GPLv2+)

    • Software

    IDEs

  • Eclipse - Extensible IDE that supports the latest Java versions as well as other languages. (EPL)
  • IntelliJ IDEA Community Editionstars14.4k - Java/Android IDE with the goal of maximizing developer productivity. (Apache License 2.0)

    • Software

    Office

  • Zathura - Highly customizable and functional document viewer. It provides a minimalistic and space saving interface as well as an easy usage that mainly focuses on keyboard interaction. (zlib License)

    • Resources

    Events

  • Software Freedom Day - Annual worldwide celebration of free software with the aim of increasing awareness of free software and its virtues.

    • Resources

    Organizations

  • Digital Freedom Foundation - Promotes access to knowledge via technology.
  • Outreachy - Helps people from underrepresented backgrounds find internships with FOSS software companies.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Dec 15th, 2018
item.description:
Software

Other

  • Simple Mobile Tools - Android apps with customizable widgets, without annoying ads and unnecessary permissions.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Nov 18th, 2018
item.description:
Hardware

Hardware Resources

  • Linux Preloaded - Hand-picked list of vendors from many regions that sell computers preinstalled with free software.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Software

Screencasting

  • ShareX - Screen capture, file sharing and productivity tool. (GNU GPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Oct 3rd, 2018
item.description:
Software

Utilities

  • Markdownify - A minimal Markdown editor. (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Sep 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Software

Utilities

  • Search Deflector - A small program that redirects searches made from the Windows Start Menu or Cortana to whatever browser and search engine you prefer. (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Aug 27th, 2018
item.description:
Resources

Articles

  • Software Freedom - Short, simple explanation of why free software is important from Devuan.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Aug 12th, 2018
item.description:
Hardware

Hardware Resources

  • disaster.radio - Off-grid, solar-powered, long-range mesh network built on free software and affordable, open hardware.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Aug 9th, 2018
item.description:
Resources

People

  • Maxime Lathuilière - Reorganizing information and resources through libre software to enable a free society.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Aug 1st, 2018
item.description:
Software

Video

  • Kodi - Home Theater software and entertainment hub. (GNU GPLv2)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jul 7th, 2018
item.description:
Resources

Talks

  • Agustín Benito: Free Software, Beyond Software (TEDxLaLaguna) (Español)
  • Prof. Nagarjuna G: Free Software for Digital India
  • Richard Stallman: Free Software, Free Society (TEDxGeneva 2014)
  • Stephen Fry: Free Software
  • Wrishiraj Kaushik: I Am Not a Free Software Guy

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jul 4th, 2018
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • MetaGer - Private search engine created by a non-profit that uses green electricity for its servers. (GNU AGPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 27th, 2018
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • Inventaire - Share books with friends and communities. (GNU AGPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 25th, 2018
item.description:
Software

Other

  • Disroot - Hosted versions of many of the services on this list. (Multiple licenses)

    • Resources

    Blogs

  • BrainBlasted's Privacy and Free Software Blog - Practical look at issues involving free software and privacy.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 24th, 2018
item.description:
Hardware

Companies

  • Aleph Objects - Respects Your Freedom (RYF) certified 3D printer built with libre hardware and software.
  • Libiquity - Designs and develops embedded software and firmware systems.
  • ThinkPenguin - Modern laptops, desktops, and printers that contain no proprietary software.
  • Vikings - Hosting company powered by Libreboot firmware, libre software, and green energy that also sells hardware.

    • Hardware

    Hardware Resources

  • Respects Your Freedom Hardware Certification - Requirements to qualify for the Free Software Foundation's RYF certification.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 14th, 2018
item.description:
Resources

Businesses

  • Bytemark - Transparent UK hosting company that offers a 50% discount for anyone publishing free software.

    • Resources

    Organizations

  • Peers - Community that helps support and grow free projects.
  • TuxFamily - No cost hosting and other services for libre projects.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 4th, 2018
item.description:
Software

Payments

  • GNU Taler - Cash-like system for online payments. (GNU GPL)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software May 28th, 2018
item.description:
Software

Operating Systems

  • Debian - One of the earliest UNIX-like operating systems with a commitment to keeping nonfree software out of its system. (DFSG)
  • LineageOS - Android distribution for phones and tablets and successor of CyanogenMod. (Multiple licenses)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software May 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Software

Audio

  • LMMS - Complete digital audio workstation. (GNU GPLv2+)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software May 12th, 2018
item.description:
Resources

Organizations

  • Free Software Movement Karnataka - Group in Bengaluru, India that spreads awareness about free software.
  • Free Software Movement of India - Coalition of free software organizations in India.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software May 10th, 2018
item.description:
Resources

Other Lists

  • Awesome Humane Techstars2.8k - List of projects focusing on ethics, transparency, and privacy.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software May 4th, 2018
item.description:
Software

Command Line Tools

  • ranger - Minimal, lightweight, and aesthetically pleasing file explorer for GNU/Linux. It runs in the terminal window, so it fits in well with window managers such as i3. vi key bindings allow for quick operations to be performed, including rename and delete. (GNU GPLv3)

    • Software

    Other

  • ZeroNet - Decentralized websites using Bitcoin cryptography and the BitTorrent network. (GNU GPLv2)

    • Software

    Web Applications

  • GitLab - Git repository manager for the entire code lifecycle. (MIT)
  • Mastodon - Decentralized social network server. (GNU AGPLv3)

    • Software

    Web Servers

  • nginx - HTTP and reverse proxy server, a mail proxy server, and a generic TCP/UDP proxy server. (2-clause BSD-like license)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software May 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Resources

Articles

  • 'Libre' Software: Turning Fads into Institutions? - Academic article presenting an economic analysis of libre software and its sustainability.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Apr 30th, 2018
item.description:
Hardware

Hardware Resources

  • h-node - Database of hardware that works with a fully free operating system.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Apr 3rd, 2018
item.description:
Software

Command Line Tools

  • Logdissectstars122 - CLI utility and Python API for analyzing log files and other data. (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Mar 13th, 2018
item.description:
Software

Communication

  • Tutanota - Encrypted email at no cost with support for business accounts. (GNU GPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Mar 11th, 2018
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • PeerTube - Decentralized video streaming service. (GNU AGPLv3)

    • Resources

    Organizations

  • April - Promouvoir et défendre le logiciel libre.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jan 3rd, 2018
item.description:
Software

Other

  • OpenMapTiles - Set of open-source tools for self-hosting of OpenStreetMap maps in more than 50 languages. It provides both raster as well as vector tiles, WMS and WMTS services for GIS programs, support for JavaScript viewers and mobile SDK. (BSD)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Dec 24th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Command Line Tools

  • asciinema - Terminal session recorder. (GNU GPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Dec 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Hardware

Companies

  • Purism - Privacy, security, and freedom focused computers and software.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Dec 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Software

Operating Systems

  • PureOS - FSF endorsed derivative of Debian. (Multiple licenses)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Dec 20th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

Organizations

  • Snowdrift.coop - Crowdmatching for public goods.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Dec 19th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • Lobsters - Link aggregation and discussion with downvote explanations. (BSD 3-clause)

    • Resources

    Organizations

  • Framasoft - Network dedicated to globally promoting free software, innovative projects, and a world of sharing and cooperation.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Nov 20th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

Organizations

  • Open Source Hardware Association - Promotes hardware that respects user freedom.

    • Resources

    Other Lists

  • Awesome Self-Hostedstars105.8k - List of FLOSS network services and web applications which can be hosted locally.
  • Awesome Sysadminstars15.3k - List of free software sysadmin tools.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Oct 1st, 2017
item.description:
Hardware

Companies

  • Raptor Computing Systems - Desktops, motherboards, and other parts utilizing the IBM POWER9 processor and OpenBMC firmware.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Aug 7th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Graphics

  • Krita - Painting program made by artists. (GNU GPLv3)

    • Software

    Web Applications

  • Phabricator - Code management platform (similar to GitLab) built with PHP. (Apache License 2.0)

    • Resources

    Licensing

  • FOSSology - License compliance toolkit for software projects.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Aug 5th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • Etherpad - Collaborative document editing in real-time. (Apache License 2.0)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jul 30th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

Discovery

  • freepost - Everything related to free culture.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jul 29th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • Ghost - Hackable platform for building and running online publications. (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jul 9th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Communication

  • Matrix - Open standard for decentralised, persistent, and interoperable communications. (Apache License 2.0)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jul 8th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • Weblate - Translation management system with version control integration. (GNU GPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jul 4th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Audio

  • Libre.fm - Stream, download, remix, and share music for free. (GNU AGPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jul 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Hardware

Companies

  • Technoethical - Laptops, adapters, and mobile devices compatible with free operating systems.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 30th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • NotABug.org - Collaboration platform for freely licensed projects. (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 25th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Communication

  • Ring - Telephone, teleconferencing, and media sharing through a distributed service. (GNU GPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 24th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Communication

  • Jitsi Meet - Secure video conferencing and desktop sharing using WebRTC. (Apache License 2.0)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 20th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • Gogs - Lightweight, cross-platform, self-hosted Git service. (MIT)
  • MediaGoblin - Publishing platform for all types of media. (GNU AGPLv3)
  • MediaWiki - Wiki software that can organize and serve large amounts of frequently accessed data. (GNU GPLv2+)

    • Resources

    Organizations

  • FSF India - Indian sister site for the FSF.
  • Software Freedom Conservancy - Charity that helps promote, improve, develop, and defend free, libre, and open source software projects.
  • Software Freedom Law Center - Provider of no-cost legal services to free, libre, and open source software creators.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 18th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

Articles

  • Free Software - Wikipedia entry on the topic of free software.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 15th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Communication

  • Tox - Encrypted and distributed messaging platform with voice, video, and screen sharing. (GNU GPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 14th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • OpenStreetMap - Map of the world created by users and released under an open license. (GNU GPLv2)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 10th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

Discovery

  • Free GNU/Linux Distributions - Entirely free distributions.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 8th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Operating Systems

  • Devuan - Fork of Debian without systemd. (Licenses)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Jun 6th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

Licensing

  • gplenforced.org - Community-oriented GPL enforcement.

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software May 28th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Utilities

  • Sandman - Lets you know when to turn off the computer and sleep based on calculated sleep cycles. (MIT)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software May 27th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Audio

  • mStream - Suite of software for syncing and streaming music across multiple devices. (GNU GPLv3)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software May 25th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • Neocities - GeoCities for the modern world. (BSD 2-clause)

item.title: johnjago/awesome-free-software Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
Software

Audio

  • Audacity - Sound recording and post-processing. (GNU GPLv2+)

    • Software

    Command Line Tools

  • Cygwin - Unix-like environment for Windows, providing access to a number of tools commonly found on Linux systems. (GNU GPLv3)
  • PuTTY - Remote terminal emulator that connects over SSH, Telnet, SCP, and rlogin protocols as well as raw socket connections. (MIT)

    • Software

    Communication

  • Mail-in-a-Box - Easy-to-deploy mail server package for cloud computers. (CC0)
  • ProtonMail - Secure web-based email service. (MIT)

    • Software

    File Management

  • 7-Zip - File archiver for creating and opening compressed files. (GNU LGPLv2.1+)
  • FileZilla - Universal FTP solution. (GNU GPLv2+)

    • Software

    Graphics

  • Blender - 3D creation suite for modeling, simulation, and animation. (GNU GPLv2+)
  • GIMP - Image manipulation software. (GNU GPLv3)
  • Inkscape - Professional vector graphics editor for all platforms. (GNU GPL)
  • Piskel - Online sprite editor. (Apache License 2.0)

    • Software

    Office

  • LibreOffice - Office suite with word processor, spreadsheet, and presentation programs. (MPLv2)

    • Software

    Payments

  • Electrum - Lightweight Bitcoin client that provides wallet recovery, decentralized servers, and offline storage. (MIT)

    • Software

    Scientific Work

  • DocEar - Literature management using mind mapping technology. (GNU GPLv2+)
  • JabRef - Manages references and attached PDFs using BibTeX/BibLaTeX. Includes support for LibreOffice. (MIT)

    • Software

    Screencasting

  • OBS Studio - Screen recorder and video streaming application for all platforms. (GNU GPLv2)
  • SimpleScreenRecorder - Highly customisable GUI screencasting program. (GNU GPLv3)

    • Software

    Text Editors

  • Atom - Hackable text and source code editor. (MIT)
  • Emacs - An extensible, customizable, free/libre text editor — and more. (GNU GPL)
  • GNU nano - Simple text editor for the command line. (GNU GPL)
  • Notepad++ - Extensible text and source code editor. (GNU GPLv2+)

    • Software

    Utilities

  • Wireshark - Packet analyzer for network troubleshooting and analysis. (GNU GPLv2)

    • Software

    Video

  • NewPipe - Lightweight YouTube frontend for Android. (GNU GPLv3)
  • VLC - Multimedia player that supports a variety of audio and video formats. (GNU GPLv3)
  • youtube-dl - Feature-rich command line program to download videos from YouTube and other video sites. (Unlicense)

    • Software

    Virtualization

  • QEMU - QEMU is a generic and open source machine emulator and virtualizer. (GNU GPLv2)
  • VirtualBox - Feature rich virtualization tools with support for many operating systems. (GNU GPLv2)

    • Software

    Web Applications

  • WordPress - Blog publishing platform and content management system. (GNU GPLv2+)

    • Software

    Web Servers

  • Apache HTTP Server - Secure, efficient, and extensible web server. (Apache License 2.0)
  • lighttpd - Optimized for speed-critical environments while remaining standards-compliant, secure and flexible. (Revised BSD license)

    • Resources

    Discovery

  • Free Software Directory - Over 15,000 free software packages.

    • Resources

    Events

  • LibrePlanet - Annual conference on free software.

    • Resources

    Organizations

  • Free Software Foundation - Nonprofit with a worldwide mission to promote computer user freedom.
  • FSFE - European sister site for the FSF.
  • FSFLA - Latin American sister site for the FSF.
  • GNU - Home of the GNU/Linux operating system.

    • Resources

    Talks

  • Eben Moglen: How I Discovered Free Software
